debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

failed_attempts:
apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1 ⊢
      exact h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv
exact List.Perm.cons_inv (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2)))

simp [List.eraseIdx]
        | succ i' ih =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx, List.getElem_cons_succ]
            exact (ih (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi)).cons.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (heq ▸ (h hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (h hidx2))).of_cons

apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := l1[idx1])
      have h (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length) : (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i).Perm l := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.perm_middle, ← List.take_succ_getElem hi, List.take_append_drop]
      rw [heq]
      exact (h l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (h l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (l := l1) idx1 hidx1).symm.trans
        (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (l := l2) idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv
exact (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))).cons_inv
exact (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))).cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))
    rw [heq] at h
    exact List.Perm.cons_inv h
exact (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx2 hidx2))).cons_inv

apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
      rw [heq]
      exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx hidx2).symm)

exact List.Perm.of_cons (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans
      (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2)))

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      exact (heq ▸ h).cons_inv

have h (l : List α) (i : ℕ) (hi : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_append_drop, ← List.take_append_drop i l, List.drop_eq_getElem_cons hi]
        exact List.perm_append_comm.trans (List.Perm.cons _ List.perm_append_comm)
      have h1 := h l1 idx1 hidx1
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans (h l2 idx2 hidx2))).cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩).symm)
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩
      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact List.Perm.of_cons (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2))

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv
exact (heq ▸ (List.perm_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).trans hperm |>.trans (List.perm_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2).symm).cons_inv

succ i ih => cases l; contradiction; exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans (ih (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)).cons
      have h := (h_ei hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (h_ei hidx2).symm)
      rw [heq] at h
      exact List.perm_cons.1 h

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h1 : l1.Perm (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
        refine List.Perm.trans ?_ List.perm_middle
        rw [List.take_append_getElem_drop l1 idx1 hidx1]
      have h2 : l2.Perm (l2[idx2] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
        refine List.Perm.trans ?_ List.perm_middle
        rw [List.take_append_getElem_drop l2 idx2 hidx2]
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).cons_inv

have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).of_cons

have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx hidx1
      have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).symm.trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l2 ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
      rw [heq] at h
      exact h.cons_inv

have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩).trans (hperm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩).symm)
    rw [heq] at h
    exact List.Perm.of_cons h
